Non-operating financial income, not revenue from sales.
Financial income, not operating revenue.

candidates.why: Tax line, unrelated to revenue.

Liability/deferred revenue related item, not the income statement top-line.

variables.notes: Selected the clear operating revenue line; do not use 'Total operating income' because it is a subtotal-style duplicate of revenue here.

candidates.why: Primary direct production/input cost; strongest COGS component.
Standard COGS adjustment line when reported alongside material costs.
Could relate to operating/maintenance overhead rather than core cost of sales; weaker fit.
Balance sheet inventory asset, not period cost of goods sold.

variables.notes: Used direct production cost components. Excluded 'Maintenance materials and services' as it is more likely maintenance/overhead than core cost of sales.

candidates.why: Core overhead/personnel expense and a standard SG&A component.
Broad operating overhead bucket; suitable SG&A component when no explicit SG&A subtotal exists.
Dedicated R&D line above operating earnings; include in XSGA as well if not clearly embedded elsewhere so XSGA-XRD removes it.
Selling/marketing overhead; clear SG&A component.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet liability, not period SG&A expense.
Operating metric, not expense line.

variables.notes: No explicit populated SG&A subtotal is present, so selected overhead components. Included R&D in XSGA as required because it is separately reported and not clearly embedded in the selected overhead buckets.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line reported above operating earnings.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D line exists and is also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD removes it.

candidates.why: Total finance cost line, but less preferred than granular recurring components when available.
Direct recurring interest cost; strongest match for XINT.
Likely additional recurring finance costs not captured in interest expense; preferable with granular mapping over using total financial expense.
Balance sheet accrual, not income statement expense.
Explicitly interest-free and on the balance sheet; not interest expense.

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring finance cost components over the broader 'Financial expense' total. Excluded FX gains/losses and other non-recurring valuation items.

candidates.why: Equity component only, not total book equity.
Best available full equity line on the balance sheet; use because no parent-only equity line is shown.
Balancing row, not a substantive equity measure.
Balancing row, not a substantive equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet size, not equity.

variables.notes: No owner/parent-only equity line or non-controlling interest line is shown, so 'Total equity' is the best available BE proxy and MIB is left empty to avoid double counting. Manual review flagged because 'Total equity' appears twice in the preview with a 1-unit discrepancy, creating duplicate-label ambiguity.
No minority interest / non-controlling interest line is visible on the balance sheet preview. Since it does not appear to exist, left empty rather than forcing a proxy.
